title: polygala gayi
intro: Polygala gayi, also known as Yuan Zhi or Polygala root, is a plant species that belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polygala gayi include improving sleep quality, reducing stress and anxiety, and enhancing cognitive function. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is often dried and made into capsules or tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions.
